seoTitle: Mole Creek vs Molesworth — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mole Creek and Molesworth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mole Creek vs Molesworth: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mole Creek and Molesworth.
heading: Mole Creek vs Molesworth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mole Creek, Tasmania and Molesworth, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Molesworth has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Mole Creek (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mole Creek or Molesworth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mole Creek has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Molesworth scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mole Creek scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Molesworth scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mole Creek or Molesworth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Molesworth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
